tldr: Discussions between the U.S. and Iran have advanced, resulting in the partial lifting of U.S. oil sanctions and Iran's agreement to allow UN nuclear inspectors back into the country.
Ukrainian President Zelenskyy has pledged to "bring war back to Russia" following drone attacks towards Moscow.
A significant heatwave is impacting central and western Europe, leading to extreme heat alerts and disruptions to rail services in Britain.

market.why: U.S. tech megacap stocks experienced a slide, driven by concerns over AI expenses and the departure of high-profile AI researchers from companies like Alphabet, which saw a significant market-cap wipeout. This indicates investor apprehension regarding the competition for AI talent and the financial implications of AI development. (Source: MarketWatch, CNBC, Yahoo Finance)

tech.summary: Google's DeepMind AI lab is collaborating with A24 to develop new movie production technologies and has reportedly invested around $75 million into the studio. (Source: The Verge)
Researchers have introduced Moebius, a 0.2B image inpainting model that achieves performance comparable to 10B-level models. (Source: Hacker News)
The National Science Foundation is reportedly redirecting funds from basic science research programs to support a new technology initiative. (Source: Hacker News)

world.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has stated his intention to "bring war back to Russia" following a series of drone attacks targeting Moscow. (Source: Guardian World)

A substantial heatwave is affecting parts of central and western Europe, prompting red heat alerts in France, Italy, and Spain, and causing essential travel warnings for UK rail passengers due to anticipated disruptions. (Source: BBC World, Guardian World)
